name: Da-vo-od Basha (Near East Dish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut unpared eggplant lengthwise and scoop out seed sections.
2. Chop the seed sections with the meat and season to taste with salt.
3. Return the mixture to the eggplant halves, pressing down into the cavities and mounding up slightly.
4. Arrange in a baking pan, adding tomato puree and vinegar sweetened to taste.
5. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes at 350°F or until the eggplants can be pierced with a fork.
Jewish Cookery by Leah H. Leonard
Crown Publishers, 1986.
